scripts.dev: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$raw = if ($env:INIT_CWD) { $env:INIT_CWD } elseif ($env:npm_package_json) { Split-Path $env:npm_package_json } else { (Get-Location).Path }; $root = ($raw -replace '^Microsoft\.PowerShell\.Core\\FileSystem::', '' -replace '^\\\\\?\\', ''); Set-Location -LiteralPath $root; node .\scripts\dev.cjs"
scripts.dev:backend: powershell -Command "if (-not $env:GOVBUDGET_AUTH_ENABLED) { $env:GOVBUDGET_AUTH_ENABLED='true' }; if (-not $env:GOVBUDGET_API_KEY) { $env:GOVBUDGET_API_KEY='dev-local-key' }; if (-not $env:GOVBUDGET_RATE_LIMIT) { $env:GOVBUDGET_RATE_LIMIT='2000' }; python -m uvicorn api.main:app --reload --port 8000"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix app install && pip install -r requirements.txt
